# Dr. Sushma S – Ayurvedic Physician & Panchakarma Specialist, Bengaluru

> Dr. Sushma S (BAMS, 2024) is a qualified Ayurvedic Physician at Vedakshethra Kerala Ayurvedic Treatment Centre, Madiwala, Bengaluru. She offers authentic Kerala-style Panchakarma and personalised treatment for lifestyle diseases, women's health (PCOD/PCOS), pain management, and holistic wellness. This is the official portfolio website.

This website is a single-page portfolio. The links below point to the main sections of the site.

## Sections

- [Home / Overview](https://drsushma.webhost.atsnet.in): Introduction to Dr. Sushma S, her credentials, and consultation details.
- [About](https://drsushma.webhost.atsnet.in/#about): Background, education, and clinical training across leading Ayurvedic institutions.
- [Skills & Specialisations](https://drsushma.webhost.atsnet.in/#skills): Areas of expertise including Panchakarma, women's health, lifestyle diseases, and pain management.
- [Experience](https://drsushma.webhost.atsnet.in/#experience): Clinical roles, internships, and hands-on practice history.
- [Research](https://drsushma.webhost.atsnet.in/#research): Published research papers and academic contributions.
- [Contact](https://drsushma.webhost.atsnet.in/#contact): Clinic location, consultation hours, phone, and email for booking appointments.

## Treatments & Services

- Panchakarma & Detox: Vamana, Virechana, Basti, Nasya, Shirodhara, and Leech therapy.
- Women's Health: PCOD/PCOS management, hormonal imbalance, menstrual disorders, and weight management.
- Lifestyle Diseases: Diabetes, hypertension, thyroid dysfunction, obesity, and metabolic disorders.
- Musculoskeletal & Pain: Cervical and shoulder pain, low back ache, sciatica, and arthritis.

## Resources

- [Sitemap](https://drsushma.webhost.atsnet.in/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap of the website.
- [Robots](https://drsushma.webhost.atsnet.in/robots.txt): Crawler access rules.

- Consultation Hours: Mon – Sun, 9:30 AM – 8:00 PM (Weekly off: usually Wednesday, subject to change)
